prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第11名（2021年第15名→2025年第11名），稳居全国Top20顶尖高校行列，近年排名持续上升；2024年声誉偏负面（内卷与人才培养机制讨论），2026年声誉明显负面（杨昀师德失范与学术不端事件），可能对报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度评价为"较热"，总排名第56位，曝光度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估A+学科7个：仪器科学与技术、材料科学与工程、生物医学工程、管理科学与工程、航空宇航科学与技术、计算机科学与技术、软件工程；A-及以上共16个学科，学科实力极强，对相关专业报考有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北航核心专业大类社会热度持续高热推荐；山西省2026年物理类考生167,419人（较2025年173,347人减少约3.4%），竞争略有缓解；北航校本部位于北京，属全国性招生高校；山西省招生人数占比较小（2025年约4.68%），地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年小幅缩招（2人）、物理类考生减少约3.4%、学校声誉偏负面但顶尖985抗风险能力强、优势学科吸引力强劲等因素，在2025年基准724名基础上，供需基本平衡。预测最低位次约717名，区间635–799名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 850 → 710 → 646 → 1132 → 724, showing significant fluctuations. In 2024, there was a notable drop to 1132, rebounding to 724 in 2025, with a two-year average of about 928; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 724. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province for science (physics category) is: 135 in 2021 → 134 in 2022 → 131 in 2023 → 131 in 2024 → 133 in 2025 → 131 in 2026, a slight reduction of 2 students compared to 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 11th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (15th in 2021 → 11th in 2025), firmly among the top 20 elite universities in China, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years. In 2024, reputation was somewhat negative (discussions on involution and talent cultivation mechanisms), and in 2026, reputation was notably negative (Yang Yun's moral misconduct and academic integrity incident), which may somewhat suppress application psychology. Douyin popularity rating is 'relatively hot', ranking 56th overall, with moderate to high exposure. No obvious records of admission cut-off gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 7 A+ disciplines: Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering. A total of 16 disciplines rated A- or above, indicating extremely strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core major categories of Beihang, such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering, continue to be highly recommended with sustained social popularity. In 2026, Shanxi Province has 167,419 physics category examinees (a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025), slightly easing competition. Beihang's main campus is located in Beijing, making it a nationally recruiting university. The proportion of enrollment in Shanxi Province is relatively small (about 4.68% in 2025), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, a slight enrollment reduction of 2 students in 2026, a decrease of about 3.4% in physics category examinees, a somewhat negative university reputation but strong risk resistance as a top 985 university, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, supply and demand are basically balanced based on the 2025 baseline of 724. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 717, with a range of 635–799.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Aerospace Leading Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligent Science Category) (including Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Software Engineering)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class)
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Top-Notch Student Training Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology Category) (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Automation, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Engineer Project-Based Education Experimental Class) (including Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Robotics Engineering, etc.)
- Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology (Outstanding Talent Training Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace Category)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross Experimental Class) (including Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 635–799, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 635), you can focus on aiming for the Future Aerospace Leading Plan, Computing and Intelligent Science Category, and other A+ discipline majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 799), it is recommended to prioritize Aerospace Category or Science Experimental Class to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 386 → 333 → 390 → 337 → 232, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend, with a significant improvement to 232 in 2025, the best in recent years. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi Province for liberal arts (history category) was: 6 in 2021 → 7 in 2022 → 8 in 2023 → 11 in 2024 → 7 in 2025 → 7 in 2026, with 2026 remaining unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 11th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national top 20, with an extremely high university level. In 2024, reputation was slightly negative (discussions on involution), and in 2026, reputation was clearly negative (Yang Yun incident), but this mainly affects science and engineering fields. Liberal arts enrollment is limited to the Social Sciences Experimental Class, which is less affected. Douyin heat evaluation is 'relatively hot'. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A (fifth round evaluation), directly corresponding to the foreign language interdisciplinary experimental class in the liberal arts enrollment majors. Although majors like Law, Economics, and Public Administration have not individually received A-class ratings, they benefit from Beihang's overall platform advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, there were 63,113 history category candidates in Shanxi Province (a decrease of about 25.6% from 84,879 in 2025), significantly easing competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the advancing trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant 25.6% decrease in history category candidates, the extremely high university level but limited liberal arts enrollment majors, and the overall improvement in the competitive environment based on the 2025 benchmark of 232, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 227, with a range of 200–254.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Beihang University only offers two enrollment majors in liberal arts in Shanxi Province: the Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law/Public Administration/Economics direction) and the Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Experimental Class. Rankings within the predicted range of 200–254 have a high probability of admission. It is recommended to prioritize the Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law direction), with the Foreign Language Interdisciplinary Experimental Class as a safe backup.
